insert.selectKey:
SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_MST] where SYS_ID = 'FS' AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_MST (SYS_ID, FS_NO, FS_SEQ, REG_CHANNEL, CST_ID, ISSUE_DATE, BILL_CST_ID, FS_MNG_ID, PROD_NM, PROD_TP_CD, PROD_TP_CUST_NM, PROD_ITEM, PROD_MAFA_NM, PROD_SER_CD, PROD_UNIT_CD, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT , CST_MNG_ID, TAX_BILL_TP_CD, CONT_ID) VALUES
,
('FS', #{item.fs_no}, #{item.fs_seq}, #{item.reg_channel}, #{item.cst_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.bill_cst_id}, #{item.fs_mng_id}, #{item.prod_nm}, #{item.prod_tp_cd}, [dbo].[FN_FS_GETSNAME2] ('5', 'FS001', #{item.prod_tp_cd}), #{item.prod_item}, #{item.prod_mafa_nm}, #{item.prod_ser_cd}, #{item.prod_unit_cd}, 'Y', #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE() , #{item.cst_mng_id}, #{item.tax_bill_tp_cd}, #{item.cont_id})
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_DTL_MEM] where SYS_ID = 'FS' AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_DTL_MEM(SYS_ID, FS_NO,FS_CHAT_ID, FS_BILL_MNG_YN, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, FS_CHAT_YN ,FS_CST_ID) VALUES
,
('FS', #{item.fs_no}, #{item.user_id}, #{item.fs_bill_mng_yn}, #{item.status}, #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.fs_chat_yn} ,#{item.cst_id})
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_ESTMATE] where SYS_ID = 'FS' AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_ESTMATE(SYS_ID, FS_NO, FS_SEQ, CST_ID, EST_TP_CD, EST_USE_YN, EST_AMT, EST_CHG_DATE, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, EST_SEQ, FS_BILL_YN) VALUES
,
(#{item.sys_id}, #{item.fs_no}, #{item.fs_seq}, #{item.cst_id}, #{item.est_tp_cd}, #{item.est_use_yn}, #{item.est_amt}, GETDATE(), #{item.status}, #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), [dbo].FN_FS_GETSEQUENCE ('TB_FS_ESTMATE',#{item.sys_id},#{item.search_seq}), 'N')
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_ATTACH(SYS_ID, FS_NO, ATCH_SEQ, ATCH_KN_CD, ATCH_NM, ATCH_SIZE, ATCH_REF_ID , URL, ORG_FILE_NM, SER_FILE_NM, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM ) VALUES( #{sys_id}, #{fs_no}, (SELECT(MAX(A.ATCH_SEQ)+1) from TB_FS_ATTACH A), #{atch_kn_cd}, #{atch_nm}, #{atch_size}, #{atch_ref_id} , #{url}, #{org_file_nm}, #{ser_file_nm}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{ssmm})

SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_DTL_CHAT] where SYS_ID = #{sys_id} AND FS_NO = #{fs_no} AND FS_CHAT_SEQ = 1
INSERT INTO TB_FS_DTL_CHAT(SYS_ID, FS_NO, FS_CHAT_ID, FS_CHAT_SEQ, CONTENTS, FS_STATUS_CD, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM) VALUES(#{sys_id}, #{fs_no}, #{fs_chat_id}, #{fs_chat_seq}, #{contents}, #{fs_status_cd}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), '')
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN END
mapper.select: SET NOCOUNT ON INSERT INTO TB_FS_BOOK_MST(SYS_ID, BOOK_TP_CD, FS_MNG_ID, CST_ID, BOOK_NM, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM) VALUES(#{sys_id}, #{book_tp_cd}, #{fs_mng_id}, #{cst_id}, #{book_nm}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{ssmm}) SELECT @@IDENTITY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_FS_BOOK_MST WHERE BOOK_SEQ = #{book_seq} AND FS_MNG_ID = #{fs_mng_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FS_BOOK_DTL(SYS_ID, BOOK_SEQ, CST_REF_ID, CST_REF_NM, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM) VALUES(#{sys_id}, #{book_seq}, #{cst_ref_id}, #{cst_ref_nm}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{ssmm})
mapper.select: SELECT SYS_ID, BOOK_SEQ, BOOK_TP_CD, FS_MNG_ID, CST_ID, BOOK_NM, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM FROM TB_FS_BOOK_MST WHERE FS_MNG_ID = #{userId} AND BOOK_NM LIKE '%' + #{book_nm} + '%'
SELECT ORG_FILE_NM, URL, ATCH_SIZE FROM TB_FS_ATTACH WHERE SER_FILE_NM = #{ser_file_nm}
